novel_features.name: Schedule Conflict Detection
novel_features.description: Find double-bookings and overlapping events across all your calendars
novel_features.rationale: Requires correlating bookings, event types, and schedules from multiple sources that only exist together in the local store

novel_features.name: Today's Schedule Dashboard
novel_features.description: See today's bookings with attendee details, conferencing links, and prep notes in one command
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining booking, calendar, and event-type data locally — no existing tool provides a unified daily view

novel_features.name: Booking Analytics
novel_features.description: Track booking volume, busiest hours, and cancellation rates over time
novel_features.rationale: Requires historical booking data that only accumulates in the local SQLite store — Cal.com Insights is paid-tier only

novel_features.name: No-Show Pattern Radar
novel_features.description: Identify which event types and time slots have the highest no-show rates
novel_features.rationale: Requires aggregating mark-absent data across bookings over time — no existing tool tracks no-show patterns

novel_features.name: Full-Text Booking Search
novel_features.description: Instant full-text search across all bookings, even offline
novel_features.rationale: Cal.com API has no search endpoint; requires FTS5 index built from synced booking data in the local store

novel_features.name: Availability Gap Finder
novel_features.description: Find unbooked availability windows to optimize your schedule
novel_features.rationale: Requires correlating schedule availability with booking history in the local store

novel_features.name: Team Workload Balance
novel_features.description: See booking distribution across team members to tune round-robin weights
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining bookings with host data across time — no existing tool provides team workload analytics

novel_features.name: Stale Event Type Cleanup
novel_features.description: Find event types with no recent bookings to clean up unused scheduling pages
novel_features.rationale: Requires cross-referencing event types with booking history in the local store
